title: syzygium endophloium
intro: Syzygium endophloium, also known as the Malabar neem or Indian neem, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antifungal, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, as well as its ability to repel insects. The health benefits of Syzygium endophloium include its use in treating skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and psoriasis, as well as its ability to lower fever and reduce inflammation. Syzygium endophloium can be prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or paste, and is also used in traditional medicine as an ingredient in various formulations.
